title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Asia Pacific Associates in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Asia Pacific Associates:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Asia Pacific Associates!
